english_level.description: Estimated CEFR level based on observed range, complexity, and accuracy.

recurring_mistakes.description: Specific grammar/usage errors seen multiple times. Short phrases like 'drops articles before nouns' or 'confuses past simple and present perfect'.

vocabulary_taught.description: Words or phrases Aiko has introduced or that the user has actively learned. Each item is a short string ('fortnight', 'on the fence', etc.).

topics_user_enjoys.description: Subjects the user has shown interest in across conversations. Short tags ('coding', 'cats', 'sci-fi', etc.).

correction_style_preference.description: How the user reacted to corrections previously.

facts_about_user.description: Concrete details the user has shared (job, location, hobbies, names of people in their life).

instructions_for_judge: Only update fields where new evidence appeared in the latest turns.
Never invent facts. Empty list is fine.
If something contradicts an existing entry, replace it; don't keep both.
